What are some of the things that annoy
you the most about AI?
Um I hate two things about AI. One is
that I think it is making people dumber
because they are choosing not to think
and they are letting AI make the
decisions, but then they have no context
into why decisions were made to begin
with because they weren't the ones who

The second is that I hate that so much

become AI slop. Like every caption on
Instagram,
uh I mean thank you messages that I get

testimonials, like it's just AI slop.
And the biggest thing you can detect
with it is forced negation and staccato

or this but that. Or it's not because
this, it's because it's because this is
this is this is. So they'll do this
repetition of sentence structure and it
gets really really annoying. And so most
times you can take a paragraph of that
and just turn it into a sentence of like
what the [ __ ] are you trying to say and
then just say that.
Yeah.
You've mentioned it a little bit in this

I think the businesses that will have

introduces AI, there will never be a

The difficulty with scaling that

the coordination of people. And so if

demand there. Um but do it in a way that
allows you to scale the ops so that you
have increasing margins and you have
less complexity, that becomes incredibly
viable business. So people-heavy,
ops-heavy businesses that are largely
digital, those are businesses that will
that will benefit the most.

the biggest shift that has to happen for
